subcodes.title: Words to Mrs A. Burks, spoken on 1914-04-14
subcodes.first_line: The book of Ighan revealed by Bahá'u'lláh in Baghdad and translated in America is one of the most fundamental Bahá'í works. Then the Hidden Words, likewise Tajalliyat, Ishraqat, Tarazat, etc, also the books of Mirza Abdu'l-Fadl.
subcodes.subjects: @study; deepening, @importance of reading the Sacred Writings
